hero.title: Check what’s really going on online ✨
hero.lead: Discover the secrets of Yasmin, Carlos & the others. With Amy Surfwing, you master challenges. Online adventures are waiting for you.
hero.imageAlt: Story world: Mia, Finn and friends

helpHint.body: If a chat, image, or post is upsetting you, talk to a trusted adult.

comingSoon.title: New stories are coming soon ✨
comingSoon.text: No story is unlocked right now. Check back again soon!

continue.title: Pick up where you left off
continue.label: Current

start.title: One week free
start.label: New for you
start.hint: No sign-up needed – just get started.

howto.title: How a day with Amy Surfwing works

1.title: 🎬 Start Amy Surfwing
1.text: One tap and you’re right in the adventure. Read what Yasmin, Carlos & the others experience online.

2.title: ✍️ Write your thoughts
2.text: Answer Amy’s question. Write what you think – and why. Only then can the story continue the next day.

3.title: 🦉 Amy responds
3.text: Sometimes Amy asks a follow-up question. And at the end of the day, you get a tip.

4.title: 🔎 Discover Amy’s world
4.text: Now you can dive deeper and deeper into Amy’s world – with lots of bonus content about digital topics.

info.title_optionA: So you can find your way easily / A few more explanations...
info.title_optionB: So you can find your way easily
info.title: So you can find your way easily

order.title: Step by step ➡️
order.text: You do the Amics in order. Each day you can read one new Amic including bonus content. You have to answer one question – only then does it continue.

reflection.title: Thinking space ◎
reflection.text: You write your own answer – in your own words. It’s not about right or wrong, but about taking time to think.

retryLock.title: Amy asks again 🔁
retryLock.text: If your answer is too short or Amy doesn’t understand what you mean, she asks again. After three tries, Amy takes a short break. Then it’s best to look at it together with someone. As soon as your answer fits, it continues.

safe.title: Fair & safe ✅
safe.text: Amy does not allow insults, bullying, or dangerous content – then she stops. And your safety comes first too. The rule is always: as soon as there is a suitable answer, it continues.

backup.title: Save & backup 💾
backup.text: Your progress is saved on your device. If you want, you can back it up as well – so nothing gets lost.

list.title: Start your Amic
list.lead: One tap and you’re right in the adventure.

trust.title: A safe space for your thoughts
trust.body: In Amy Surfwing, you don’t just read – you think along. No one sees what you write. There are no likes, no ranking, and no comparison. Your progress stays on your device. Here, you can calmly think about what you believe is right – and learn step by step to make good decisions on your own.

aym.title: What it looks like – and what you can do with it

0.title: Story
0.text: You dive into the world of Yasmin, Igor & the others.
0.imageAlt: Illustration: characters in a digital story scene

1.title: Keep thinking
1.text: While reading, you’re not just watching: What triggers you? What feels unfair to you?
1.imageAlt: Illustration: thoughtful moment in the story

2.title: Tip
2.text: Based on your answer, Amy gives you a tip.
2.imageAlt: Illustration: your own answer in the story flow

avatar.title: Avatars
avatar.text: Create your own avatar and earn new looks.

sticker.title: Stickers
sticker.text: You get a sticker for every completed episode.

newspaper.title: School Newspaper
newspaper.text: Here you’ll find easy-to-understand topics, audio posts, and knowledge to look up.

coins.title: Coins
coins.text: You collect coins for every Amic. If you keep going regularly, you even get extra ones.

diary.title: Diary
diary.text: What are Mia, Yasmin & Jonas thinking? You can write your own diary too.

collectibles.title: Collectible Cards
collectibles.text: The collectible cards help you get to know the characters better.

survey.description_optionA: Tell us how you liked the story – anonymously and in just a few minutes.
survey.noticeBody: You will be redirected to an external form (Microsoft Forms). The provider’s privacy policy applies.
survey.description_optionB: Tell us how you liked the story – the survey is anonymous and only takes a few minutes.
survey.title: 📝 Short survey
survey.description: Tell us how you liked the story – anonymously and in just a few minutes.

s1e01.title: Trouble at the Waterfall
s1e01.description: A quiet holiday Saturday escalates: likes, FOMO, AI, a waterfall – and suddenly every decision matters.

s1e02.title: Alarm in the Class Chat
s1e02.description: An argument in the class chat: threats and fake news are flying around – until an unexpected twist changes everything.

s1e03.title: The Tunnel to Ruin
s1e03.description: The chat never sleeps. One person can’t keep up anymore. Who decides when it stops – the phone or us?

album.title: Sticker Album
album.subtitle: Collect stickers & badges – your progress stays on your device.

adultHint.title: Talk briefly with an adult
adultHint.body: Some things are best discussed offline with a trusted adult (for example a parent, teacher, or school counselor).

safety.selfHarmShort: It sounds like this is feeling really overwhelming right now. There is help – please get support now.

gate.nextTomorrowBody: The next Amic is waiting for you tomorrow. Until then, you can browse the school newspaper.

perspective.label: Perspective-taking
perspective.description: How well your child recognises and considers other people’s points of view.

judgement.label: Critical judgement
judgement.description: How your child evaluates information and assesses situations.

selfRegulation.label: Self-regulation
selfRegulation.description: How your child handles impulses and pursues personal goals.

responsibility.label: Responsible action
responsibility.description: How your child takes responsibility for their own actions and for others.

privacyProtect.label: Protecting privacy
privacyProtect.description: Protects own and others’ privacy and data.

doNotHarm.label: Avoiding harm
doNotHarm.description: Refrains from actions or content that could harm others or oneself.

intervene.label: Intervening
intervene.description: Actively intervenes when witnessing problematic behaviour (e.g. cyberbullying).

takeResponsibility.label: Acting positively
takeResponsibility.description: Actively supports positive and respectful behaviour in digital spaces.

rulesConsequences.label: Rules & consequences
rulesConsequences.description: Understands and respects digital rules and their consequences.

interruptImpulse.label: Interrupting impulses
interruptImpulse.description: Interrupts impulsive or automated media behaviour (e.g. endless scrolling).

keepLimits.label: Keeping limits
keepLimits.description: Maintains self-set usage limits or goals.

steerAttention.label: Steering attention
steerAttention.description: Consciously steers attention despite digital distractions.

pursueGoal.label: Pursuing goals
pursueGoal.description: Pursues self-set goals over time despite media distractions.

regulateEmotions.label: Recognising feelings & acting deliberately
regulateEmotions.description: Recognises own feelings and regulates behaviour deliberately rather than reacting impulsively.

perspectivesRecognize.label: Recognising perspectives
perspectivesRecognize.description: Recognises and describes different perspectives and interests without judging them.

mediaEffectUnderstand.label: Understanding media effects
mediaEffectUnderstand.description: Understands how media content affects different people or groups.

perspectivesDistinguish.label: Distinguishing perceptions
perspectivesDistinguish.description: Clearly distinguishes own perception from the perception of others.

rolesUnderstand.label: Understanding roles
rolesUnderstand.description: Understands social roles in media contexts (e.g. influencer, viewer, platform).

goalConflicts.label: Recognising goal conflicts
goalConflicts.description: Recognises conflicts between personal interests and shared rules or expectations.

credibilityAssess.label: Assessing credibility
credibilityAssess.description: Evaluates the credibility of information using clear criteria.

manipulationRecognize.label: Recognising manipulation
manipulationRecognize.description: Identifies distortions, manipulation or one-sided representations.

informationClassify.label: Comparing information
informationClassify.description: Compares different pieces of information or arguments.

judgementExplain.label: Reasoning judgements
judgementExplain.description: Justifies own judgements logically and clearly.

overview.aiTranslated: Story translated with AI · May contain errors

survey.question: I have a question for you — what do you think so far?
survey.body: 3 minutes, anonymous. Your opinion helps us improve Amy Surfwing.
survey.betaQuestion: 📝 What do you think of Amy Surfwing?
survey.betaDisclaimer: You'll be redirected to Microsoft Forms – your answers are stored anonymously, we receive no personal data. Participation is voluntary.

welcome.headline: Your feedback makes Amy Surfwing better.
welcome.subline: You get to try Amy Surfwing before everyone else.
welcome.contactHint: Questions or feedback? Write to us:
welcome.consentLabel: I'd like to test Amy Surfwing and agree that my usage is stored anonymously to help us improve the app. Voluntary.

completion.sendTitle: Would you like to share your results with us?
completion.sendBody: Your usage data helps us develop Amy Surfwing further. Anonymous, voluntary.
completion.downloadedHint: Now send it as an attachment to:
completion.sharedSuccess: ✓ Sent! Thank you so much for your feedback.
completion.sentThanks: Thank you! This helps us a lot. 🙏
